mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, directly increasing present valuations and driving positive forward S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession risk, causing investors to price in lower corporate earnings and driving negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and positive wealth effects, generating strong corporate revenue growth and positive forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to predict positive returns with an IC below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects improving supply-side capacity utilization and corporate earnings momentum, driving positive short-term market returns as investors anticipate higher profits.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power when inflation exceeds 4% annually, resulting in Rank IC below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding economic activity and corporate revenue potential, supporting positive forward equity returns over a quarter as labor demand fuels consumption.
failure_condition: Payroll growth decouples from equity returns during stagflation periods, yielding negative IC over 24 months.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing real GDP growth below 1% signals weakening aggregate demand and earnings headwinds, triggering negative forward market returns as investors discount future cash flows.
failure_condition: Market remains positive despite sub-1% GDP growth in >50% of cases, invalidating the recession risk channel.

mechanism_narrative: Rising inflation combined with a lagging federal funds rate creates negative real yields and policy uncertainty, compressing equity valuations and driving negative forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Negative real yield environment fails to predict negative 5-day returns with an IC below 0.01 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a high-inflation regime signals supply constraints and margin compression, leading to negative forward returns over a quarter as cost pressures outweigh volume gains.
failure_condition: Industrial production declines do not correlate with negative returns when energy prices are stable, causing IC to drop below 0.02.
